title: Basic pie dough
intro: Here is a no butter recipe

insSteps: In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
Mix quickly until a smooth ball of dough forms. Be careful to mix for as short a time as possible so the dough doesn't become too tough and retains its crispness; pie dough should not be kneaded.
If the dough is too sticky, add a little flour; if it is too dry, add a little oil and/or water.
Lightly flour your work surface, roll out the dough, and place it in the tart pan.
Add a layer of almond powder (if for a sweet pie) or mustard (if savory) to protect the dough from an overly wet filling.
All that remains is to add your filling and bake (usually 35–45 minutes at 180°C).

notes: For a crumblier pie, add more oil and less water.
